Tutorials

Step-by-step tutorials for Terry-Form MCP

Learn Terry-Form MCP through hands-on tutorials.

Beginner

Your First Terry-Form Project

beginner 15 minutes

Build a Docker image, configure your AI assistant, and run your first Terraform validation

Intermediate

Building AWS Infrastructure

intermediate 30 minutes

Build a complete VPC with subnets, security groups, and a load balancer using Terry-Form MCP

Security Scanning Pipeline

intermediate 20 minutes

Use Terry-Form's analysis tools to find vulnerabilities and enforce best practices

Terraform Module Development

intermediate 25 minutes

Build, validate, and test reusable Terraform modules using LSP features

GitHub Actions Pipeline

intermediate 30 minutes

Automate Terraform validation, security scanning, and plan comments on pull requests

Advanced

Multi-Environment Setup

advanced 35 minutes

Manage dev, staging, and production environments with shared modules and cross-environment planning

Interactive Example

Ask your AI assistant:

Can you validate the Terraform configuration in my workspace/example folder?

The assistant will use Terry-Form MCP to check your configuration and provide feedback.

  • Report issues on GitHub
  • Join GitHub Discussions
